mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_link_stats_today (gid, full_short_url, date, today_uv, today_pv, today_uip, create_time, update_time, del_flag) VALUES (#{gid}, #{fullShortUrl}, #{date}, #{todayUv}, #{todayPv}, #{todayUip}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE today_uv = today_uv + VALUES(today_uv), today_pv = today_pv + VALUES(today_pv), today_uip = today_uip + VALUES(today_uip), update_time = NOW()
